description: 10TACLE STUDIOS was specialized in the development of games that brought a significant added value to the field of game design.
name: 10tacle Studios

description:
Sunborn Network Technology (formerly LBX Network Technology) is the legal representative video game company front of MICA Team - a Chinese independent video game developer. Both companies were founded by Yuzhong and owned by him, with him being the president of both. Due to Sunborn's status as a private, limited company, the only outside coroporation with investments into it is Tencent, which acquired a 20% shares of Sunborn through a tactical investment in 2021. Yuzhong owns 70% equity, directly in shares and indirectly through his self-founded private equity firms, which he uses to reinvest his CEO salary. The other 10% is owned by numerous other employees of Sunborn.[2]

While many see Sunborn as a legal shell for MICA Team, they are officially still stated to be two separate entities, and often appear side by side during conferences and conventions.
name: Sunborn Network Technology

description: CyrustheVirus Studios was established by Sheldon Slater, also known as CyrustheVirus001, in 2019. Serving as the sole developer, programmer, animator, artist, and composer for the project Cold Lazarus.
name: CyrusTheVirus Studios

description:
300AD is an independent company associating developers and distributors of games, which has been in the business for more than 6 years. 
 
The success of our games consists in the design purity, simplicity and maximum playability, which brings our players lots of fun. We do not compete with large companies which produce games for hard-core players only. On the contrary, we aim to do games which can be played by children, their parents and possibly any people who want to take a rest from their busy lives for a while.
name: 300AD

description: Korean indie horror games
name: Jayhyeon Studio

description:
Bandai Digital Entertainment Company (BDE or BDEC) refers to Japanese and American subsidiaries of Bandai that published software titles for the Pippin Atmark and Pippin @WORLD consoles, respectively.

BDEC's parent company Bandai licensed the technology for the Pippin platform from Apple Computer in December 1994. Bandai promoted early Pippin development under the name of Bandai Digital Software at the 1995 Tokyo Toy Show in June. Bandai Digital Entertainment Corporation was established in October 1995 to support the platform and developers in the United States. Bandai Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. was formed on January 9, 1996 to support the platform in Japan.

After the console only sold 30,000 and 12,000 units respectively in Japan and the United States, Bandai announced on February 27, 1998 that it would officially abandon the Pippin platform and close Bandai Digital Entertainment on March 13, 1998. Its facilities and staff were absorbed by other divisions of Bandai. A department at Bandai's development headquarters was assigned to continue providing support for Pippin users until December 31, 2002.
name: Bandai Digital Entertainment

description:
Established in 2023, our team comprises seasoned industry veterans who embarked on a mission to construct the ultimate UGC online open world for exploration and creativity.

With decades of expertise in shipping some incredible multiplayer experiences and platforms, we have previously contributed to some of the most renowned and successful game titles. We meticulously assembled our team to craft something truly extraordinary.

Our work environment mirrors the ethos of old-school game developers, fostering a collaborative atmosphere where everyone can make meaningful contributions at various levels.

We have garnered support from exceptional venture capitalists from around the globe, and we are determined to deliver an experience that we believe will make a significant impact on the gaming industry.
name: Onibi

description: Large Battleship Studios is the creation of Saint Bomber, writer of heartfelt, romantic, comedic, thoughtful and deeply enthralling yuri (gxg) games, and their muses. Together, the Battleship has been producing free yuri games and demos in the RPG Maker engine for over a decade.
name: Large Battleship Studios

description: Exanticx Studio est un studio de jeux vidéo français et leur premier jeux est "Better Mart"
name: Exanticx Studio

description:
Freejam was founded in Portsmouth, UK by five guys with a solid belief in one simple game idea ‘Robocraft’. We pooled our combined 52 years of traditional games development experience, came up with great idea and by incorporating a new lean-start-up philosophy etched into our brains we were set free to innovate.

We created Freejam to prove truly amazing games can be created through experimentation and evolution. The ‘founding five’ are skilled and organised professional game developers who have embraced the indie way. We are small so we can react fast, listen to our players, make quick decisions, try new stuff out and sculpt our game super efficiently. In the same unrestrained way that musicians write songs, from a simple jam session with a few chords we will create a game that grows into a masterpiece over time with support from our players…

Our journey is a personal experience for the team and we will share our highs and lows with you all on our website and across social media (Facebook, Twitter and Reddit). Our approach relies on open and transparent interaction with our players – we simply can’t make this type of game without input from everyone. We don’t know where Robocraft is going to end up, nor do we know how long it will take, but to be honest that’s all part of the fun.

Give us your voice and help us make the most perfect computer game inspired by everyone.
name: Freejam Games

description: We Challenge, Enchant and evoke Wonder
name: Enchanted Works

description: Machatin is a Japanese game developer known for the Spella and We Cheer series. Lately they tackle the mobile market with Damaged Hero -Kamen no Yusha-.
name: Machatin

description:
We are indie game studio crafting games with strange ideas, bold mechanics, and art styles that don’t follow the rules. Our games are challenging—sometimes brutally—but always rewarding. We mix genres, break patterns, and experiment with gameplay that keeps you guessing… and coming back for more.
Stay tuned. It’s only getting weirder from here.
Remember: Voices in Your Head; Gamified
name: LampDog Studio

PEC Game Design GmbH, founded in 2024 and based in Basel, Switzerland, is on a mission to create substantial contributions to the still small, but growing Swiss gaming-market.

The studio aims to demonstrate "Community is at the heart of everything: Blend the proven success of beloved, established games with groundbreaking innovations and features inspired by what the community truly desires."

description: 4A Games is a video game development studio known for its atmospheric first person shooters Metro 2033 and Metro: Last Light. The studio was established in 2005 by experienced game industry professionals with the aim of creating premium quality games for latest generation consoles and personal computers. All our experience, talent and enthusiasm go into creating games with deep story, unique gameplay elements and highly detailed believable environments. In addition to that, our in-house developed 4A Engine is constantly evolving with the latest industry trends and being highly scalable delivers a good performance on older devices while giving great looking picture on high-end machines.

description: Ubisoft Chengdu was founded in 2008 in Chengdu, as Ubisoft's second studio in China. The studio also served as a support studio, working on games such as Scott Pilgrim vs. the World: The Game, and provided Chinese localisation services for games like Might & Magic: Duel of Champions. Ubisoft Chengdu led the development of Monkey King Escape, a mobile title, and casual games Scrabble (2013), Uno (2017) and Wheel of Fortune. The studio has over 420 employees.

description:
Shiver Entertainment, Inc. is a Miami, Florida based game development studio. They are primarily known for developing entries for WB Games. Some games they developed include Scribblenauts Showdown, and the Switch ports of Hogwarts Legacy and Mortal Kombat 1.

In December 21st, 2021 they had been acquired by Saber Interactive, Inc., a subdivision of Embracer Group.

In May 20th, 2024 Nintendo Co., Ltd. announced the acquisition of 100% of the outstanding shares of Shiver Entertainment from Embracer Group.
name: Shiver Entertainment

description: A competitive game publishing platform to help developers in india and southeast asia to publish their games, and compete with the global incumbents.

description:
Formerly known as ESN. 
Acquired by Electronic Arts on June 1st, 2012 and renamed quietly at some point after that. 
 
"We are Uprise. An EA studio located in Sweden." 
"We create companion and online experiences for games." 
 
Responsible for Battlelog, and later Battlefield Companion, in the Battlefield games. It uses their original network framework, Planet. 
"Battlelog is the social layer of Battlefield. Launched back in 2012, Battlelog spans over desktop, mobile, tablet and game."

description: We’re a small games studio located in Hurbanova Ves, Slovakia. We’re currently busy working on our first puzzle game.

description: Studio Reignbow is a group of friends who came together to impulsively make visual novels. Some of us are streamers, some of us just like writing, we're all creatives who like really hot guys!

description: Ubisoft Kyiv was founded in 2008 in Kyiv, Ukraine, originally as Ubisoft Kiev. The studio's focus is to port Ubisoft games to personal computers (PCs), and the studio has also worked on titles such as Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon Future Soldier and Watch Dogs 2. Ubisoft Kyiv partnered with Massive Entertainment on Uplay and frequently worked with RedLynx on Trials games. In 2016, the studio launched a quality control department for PC ports. Recently, Ubisoft Kyiv has worked closely with Ubisoft Quebec on Assassin's Creed Odyssey's PC version, and with RedLynx on Trials Rising. In December 2019, Ubisoft Kiev was rebranded as Ubisoft Kyiv to adopt the Ukrainian spelling of the city's name.
name: Ubisoft Kyiv

description: The Wizarding World (previously known as J. K. Rowling's Wizarding World) is a fantasy media franchise and shared fictional universe centred on a series of films, based on the Harry Potter/Fantastic Beasts novel series by J. K. Rowling.

An indie game studio based in Prague. Creators of the hit VR rhythm game.

Acquired in 2019 by Meta/Facebook Technologies.

description: We founded our mobile game dev studio in Prague back in April 2015. Our humble goal: conquer the world of mobile gaming! What else?! Since then it’s been a rollercoaster ride through many ups and downs – just like any other indie studio – and we’ve enjoyed it a lot. Our journey taught us to remain humble and diligent while keeping the most demanding ambitions. Go ahead and find out more about the Monkeys.

description: Ubisoft Singapore was formed in 2008 as Ubisoft's first in-house studio in South-East Asia, located on the Fusionopolis complex in Singapore. Having served as a support studio, working on games such as Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands and Assassin's Creed II, the company worked on the naval combat of Assassin's Creed III before significantly expanding it with Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag and Assassin's Creed Rogue. The company is also responsible for making the AAA multiplayer online shooting game Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon Phantoms, released in 2014 and closed in December 2016. After the closure of Ghost Recon Phantoms, the studio's creative director, Justin Farren, came to Ubisoft's E3 2017 press conference to announce their new IP named Skull & Bones, the development of which it would lead. The game is scheduled to be released sometime after April 2022. Ubisoft Singapore has 500 employees.
name: Ubisoft Singapore

description: IQ Media Nordic was a Swedish games publisher until merged into Pan Vision in 2001.

name: Ramen Cat Studio

description:
Bohfam Games is an independent game development studio founded by Myra Boholst. Established in 2015, the studio develops and publishes games across PC and mobile platforms.

Bohfam Games has released several titles including the PC games Reigning Cats and Exoplanets, as well as mobile games such as Not of This World, Fat Finger, and SDX Sykadelix Brick Breaker. The studio focuses on developing original gameplay systems and experimenting with different genres and mechanics.
name: bohfam games

description:
June is an indie game studio,
with over 140 Million downloads on the App Stores.
The June story is the "3 Guys a dog and a Dream" story where in June 2010 we created "TapToLearn" and our first game that shipped in June 2010 went to Top 25 grossing which prompted our move to the Silicon Valley and our acceptance into yCombinator and ImagineK12 as the 2nd ever company from India to do so.

We also raised seed investments from prominent investors like Ron Conway, Yuri Milner, Ari Emmanuel, Vinod Khosla and other Silicon Valley luminaries for our TapToLearn business.

TapToLearn Games are used by over 40 million kids and over 18000 schools worldwide.

In 2014, June released the hit realtime multiplayer game called "Ninjump Dash" and we built free to play games expertise with newer games such as Chhota Bheem, Motu Patlu, Road Riot, Tower Conquest and MaskGun, a realtime FPS for mobile which was the NDGC Game of the Year 2016.

Since 2017 we have changed our focus completely to building “Free To Play” Games as part of our vision of

"Building Games that People Play for Years"
name: June Gaming

description: Developer of iOS game, Ultra Deep.
name: Viqua Games

description: Creators of Game Dev Tycoon (mobile, Switch), now working on We Are Screwed!

description: Business Division 1 (第1ビジネス・ディビジョン, Dai Ichi Bijinesu Dibijon?) was an internal development division within Square Enix. It was largely made up of the team behind the Final Fantasy XIII series of games and was formed in 2013 after an internal restructuring. It was meant to continue to put out "mainline" games within the Final Fantasy series. In the mid 2010s this unit began development of Final Fantasy VII Remake. In 2019, following another internal restructuring, Business Division 1 was merged with Business Division 3 and Business Division 4 to form Creative Business Unit I, which inherited all projects, including Final Fantasy VII Remake.
name: Square Enix Business Division 1

description:

We find in escape games the way to fulfill our long-standing wishes to create stories. We always liked the idea of creating video games and directing movies. Our games are the channel through which we shape everything we have in mind..

Yuri Kissaten is a game studio and publishing house dedicated to games about girl loving girls. The name comes from the Japanese term used for lesbian media, and one word for café (which is why we say you’re welcome to the café!)

Founded in 2024 by Fruz, artist, writer, etc!

Welcome to Summer 93 Studio, an indie game studio based in the sunny south of France, in Montpellier.

Founded by a passionate game designer with over 8 years of experience and more than 15 projects completed, Summer 93 Studio is built on the love of turning imagination into playable worlds. From breathtaking landscapes to engaging gameplay, we aim to craft games that leave a lasting impression, one unforgettable experience at a time.

Their titles include Starbrew Station, Tumblefire, and Spud Customs. Lost Rabbit Digital operates as a subsidiary of HailBytes.

description:
Team Asobi （Team アソビ) was founded in 2012 as a subdivision of Japan Studio. It is based in Tokyo and was opened by Nicolas Doucet. The team's name is derived from the Japanese word "Asobi", meaning "Play".

Across late 2020 and early 2021, several staff members of Japan Studio, outside those of Team Asobi, announced their departure; Sony later affirmed that by April 2021, Japan Studio would be refocused around Team Asobi based on the success of Astro's Playroom. In June 2021, Sony announced that Team Asobi had been transitioned to a standalone studio within PlayStation Studios. Doucet remains Asobi's studio director and creative director following this transition.

Their works include ASTRO BOT: Rescue Mission for Playstation VR, and ASTRO’s PLAYROOM and ASTRO BOT for PlayStation 5.
name: Team Asobi

description: We want to create new games to be loved for a long time all over the world.

description: AHEAD Entertainment is a technology company focused on the development of next-gen tools and technology for cloud-native games. Our intent is to push the boundaries of innovation in order to create the most engaging, immersive and flawlessly-fast entertainment experiences in the world.

description:
We aim to make world-class games and learn a lot along the way.

Evil Empire is a “triple i” game development studio based in Bordeaux, France. We strive to create world class games in a human centered, results driven workplace. Our ambition is to create the kind of financial stability and healthy work life balance that allows people to project themselves into a decades long career in games, at Evil Empire.
name: Evil Empire

description: Toth Games is a small game studio owned and founded by Mike Toth in Mai 2022. A commercial pilot with a love to video games. Toth Games is registered PlayStation partner and specializes iteself on publishing games to the PlayStation universe. Toth Games is always looking for developers who want publish their games to PlayStation.
name: Toth Games

description:
Red Robot Labs is a mobile gaming studio that provides users with a location-based mobile gaming platform. The company acquired Supermono Studios in the same year they were founded.

On the website:
"Red Robot Labs is a mobile gaming studio in Mountain View, California. Known for its breakout release, Life Is Crime, Red Robot Labs is pioneering the location-based gaming market with advanced geospatial gameplay for mobile platforms. It is lead by veterans of the social and console gaming industries and maintains high profile investors including social gaming mogul, Rick Thompson."
name: Red Robot Labs

description: Daztrax Studios is an independent game development studio and creative label established on December 28, 2022, in Costa Rica. The studio gained recognition for its rhythm-based video game LEZ and continues to focus on producing original indie titles and promoting creative projects that push the boundaries of interactive media.

From the folks at Super Rare Games behind all your fave physical games, Super Rare Originals is a brand new digital indie publisher for consoles and PC.

Our aim is not just to work on unique, fun indie video games of the highest calibre, but to help truly support developers of all scales with our indie-first approach where they're the boss. We only pitch for games we truly, personally love and want to play - and we think you’ll love them too!
name: Super Rare Originals

In 2017, Triumph Studios was acquired by Paradox Interactive.

An Indie studio that aims to create narrative driven visual novels about self discovery and human connection.
We aspire to design games that inspire players, grounding them in who they are while reaching toward something higher.

Founded in 2017, TREBUCHET began as a team of three game design graduates who shared a passion for virtual reality.

Since then, the studio has experienced significant growth, but is still driven by their ambition to create fun and innovative VR games. They take pride in developing their own titles and universe, reflecting their appreciation for boldness, creativity, and humour.

"We create original VR gaming experiences that influence and push the boundaries of interactivity."

description: We specialize in the production and development of mobile and PC video games. We are convinced that video games can improve our lives and therefore we seek not only to entertain, but also to provide additional value.

Frame Interactive is an independent game studio whose main office is in Burlington, Vermont, USA. Our first game is Headmaster, a Sony backed VR title that's exclusive to PS VR.
Frame was started in 2015 by Ben Throop, former game director at Activision studio Vicarious Visions.

description: “Space Backyard” is an independent creative crew made up of Alessandro Arcidiacono, Simone Tranchina, Maddalena Grattarola, and Gianluca Pandolfo. We're constantly searching for amazing life stories that we like to share in a unique way through videogames and visual arts.
name: Space Backyard

description: Lunar Software is an independent games company based in the UK that currently consists of 4 people, Aaron Foster, Jemma Hughes and Pete Dissler. We are currently working on our first title called Routine that is a first person horror exploration game set on the Moon! Routine will be a commercial release aimed towards the PC and MAC through Steam!

description:
8Bit Games was formed in 2003 by Adam Tween, Stefan Hopper and Dave Vout, three long-established veterans of the PC and console development community. The company was a developer of mobile entertainment and based in London.

For over 5 years 8bit Games created 30+ games based on the biggest brands for the world's top publishers, including Lemmings, which was voted game of the year by the readers of What Mobile magazine. In 2004 the company was nominated for best handheld studio in the Develop Industry Awards.

In 2008 the company founders set up a new company called Big Head Games.
name: 8Bit Games

description: This is the main team behind the in-development Sonic 2: Gear Shift/Running for Miles.
name: Team Supernova

description:
About Saphire Game Studio

We are an independent game studio that emerged in 2022 at Fatec Carapicuíba, in São Paulo, during the graduation of Gabriel Rocha, our founder.

With the arrival of Decomposition, Saphire became independent from the academic scene and transformed itself into a game company/studio.

A pioneer in the creation of Brazilian titles for the international market, Saphire stands out for its creativity and ability to create unique and vivid titles, focused on narrative and gameplay.
name: Saphire Game Studio

description: GRIP Digital is a privately owned developer and publisher of video games for consoles, PC and high-end portable devices, based in Czech Republic. We offer unique set of business and development services and focusing our activities on global markets.
name: Grip Digital

description: Indie Games Developmen Studio from Spain. Looking for another kiund of games.
name: Another Path Studios

description:
LDLC VR Studio, a subsidiary of LDLC Group, was created in early 2020 near the city of Lyon, in France. The studio is dedicated to creating virtual reality video games for arcade VR rooms, and soon for individual players.

The studio has decided to focus on virtual reality to offer immersive VR experiences and provide players with original adventures through effective gameplay.

Their game catalogue includes Gang Of Dummizz, in which players must rob a bank without getting caught, and Rune Tales, a cooperative game where players must fight against a horde of enemies in a medieval city.

LDLC VR Studio also develops custom applications (serious games, virtual tours) and virtual reality training. The studio plans to expand by offering their first game for individual players very soon.
name: LDLC VR Studio

description:
Pointware Corporation,
3990 Westerly Place, Suite 210
Newport Beach, CA 92660
name: Pointware

description: With endless challenges and an unbreakable spirit of challenge, we resonate bright thoughts throughout the world.
name: WOORE

description: A team of Spanish developers made of JOHNNY.JPG and NAZHOR
name: The Brodevhood
The Bartlet Jones Supernatural Detective Agency

description: We are an independent game publisher bi-coastally based in North America, with a passion for two things: games and building fandoms.
name: Shoreline Games

description: We are an indie team obsessed with card games and good user experiences. We started ZenDeck because we were tired of multiplayer games making you jump through hoops just to play a match with a friend. We focus on building web-based card games that are completely frictionless—no downloads, no forced logins, just pure gameplay and amazing custom artwork. We’re currently focused on expanding Hanafuda Legends, but we are always dreaming up new ways to bring tabletop classics to the web.
name: ZenDeck Interactive

description: VR Nerds was founded in 2013 in Hamburg, Germany and has since positioned itself as a thought leader in the global VR industry. With an inhouse development studio with experienced virtual reality veterans, a news website, a B2B division and their VRHQ event and coworking location, the startup has gained expertise across a wide range of VR applications. With their critically and commercially acclaimed VR arcade shooter Tower Tag, they have celebrated worldwide success in over 40 countries across North America, Asia, Europe, Australia, Africa and the Middle East.
name: VR Nerds

description: Nitro Games is a Finnish free-to-play mobile game developer and publisher. Nitro Games team is a multinational group of mobile gaming professionals. The team has the expertise from development to publishing to live-operations. Everyone is a passionate gamer.
name: Nitro Games

description:
The company was founded as Phoenix Software, Inc. in 1981 by Ron Unrath, run out of his house in Lake Zurich, Illinois.

In 1984 the company was sold because larger companies started to enter the industry and the advertising rates were going up.
The company became Zooom Software for a short time and eventually it was changed to American Eagle Software, Inc.
name: American Eagles Software, Inc.

description: Developer of 4Story, Travia2 and other MMORPGs.
name: Zemi Interactive

description: Crafting mobile games that blend play and emotion for an unforgettable experience!
name: Playmotional

description: We are the official home of Special Force Philippines. Our focus is to deliver stable, fair, and exhilarating gameplay for its dedicated community, while actively seeking the next great game to share with the world.
name: MyGame Interactive

description: Honi Games is an indie games developers group located in Bilbao, Spain, and was founded on November 8, 2020. They are most known for Witch Cry, a game created that was published by Keplerians Publishing.
name: Honi Games

description:
NEXON M is a mobile game publisher based in the San Francisco Bay Area. Founded in 2013, NEXON M focuses on free-to-play games for mobile and counts some of the world’s best developers as our partners, including Big Huge Games and Respawn Entertainment. 
 
NEXON M’s focus on free-to-play games for mobile can be traced to our roots as a subsidiary of NEXON Corp. As Korea’s largest game company and one of the ten largest game companies in the world, NEXON is known for having created the first free-to-play games in the early 2000′s and has multiple live games which recently passed their 10-year anniversaries.
name: Nexon M Inc.

description: Catch the Void is an independent studio from Toronto, Canada fueled by caffeine, chaos, and a suspiciously large number of cats. We make games with teeth, heart, and a pinch of madness.
name: Catch The Void

description: A puzzle designer and commissioner of The Mystery League.
name: Sandy Weisz

description: Nintendo Research & Development No. 4 was the largest software development division within the Japanese video game company Nintendo. It was preceded by the Creative Department, a team of designers with backgrounds in art responsible for many different tasks to which Shigeru Miyamoto and Takashi Tezuka originally belonged.
name: Nintendo R&D4

description: Wikkl is a Utrecht-based co-development studio specialized in interactive applications, including unique IP.
name: Wikkl

description:
Hey, I’m Serag—aka Kenshi!
Solo game dev from Iraq, turning wild ideas into indie games.

It’s all about the grind, the vibes, and having fun on the journey.
Follow along, and let’s create something epic together!
name: KenshiDev

description: camelCase Games is an Indie PC Games Developer Studio based in Germany.
name: camelCase Games

description: ICAD/VisionLab is a Research & Development Lab on Visualization, Digital TV/Cinema, and Games. The mission of the Lab is “to promote technological innovation and education emerging from the convergence of computer graphics, artificial intelligence, digital entertainment, visualization, and games”. ICAD/VisionLab is a pioneer in VFX R&D in Brazil.
name: ICAD/VisionLab PUC-Rio

description: Visual Novel Development
name: JAYBE GAMES

description: Found in the early 80s as 'MicroLeague Sports Association', MicroLeague Multimedia would release games until filing for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in 1997 and reestablishing itself as AbleSoft, a developer of software for the learning and education sector.
name: MicroLeague Multimedia, Inc.

description: Story reach and mysterious Room Escape, Adventure and Point & Click games by independent game developer. Creepy stylized graphics included.
name: Labeledman

description: Studio Mantasaur is a small team of 4 indie devs who started All Hands on Deck, a 2-player cosy co-op game for Steam and Switch, back in 2021 when they were still in university studying game development. Over time, the team shifted a little, and they collaborated with a few external friends, but the heart of the project a game about helping each other out stayed the same. So what began as a student project slowly turned into a wild ride full of learning, experimenting, and plenty of debugging. All Hands on Deck is their first completed release as a team.
name: Studio Mantasaur

description: Pocketeers Limited was a game developer that created stunning and interesting content for all mobile platforms and consoles.
name: Pocketeers

description:
Sanritsu Denki was the video game division of Sanritsu Electronics, co. Ltd.
It was contracted by Sega to port many of their games to home platforms, mainly the Sega Mega Drive, Sega Master System and Sega Game Gear.
It would later start a joint venture with Sega, SIMS.
name: Sanritsu

description: Sneaky Yak Studio is a young independent video game studio with a small team of passionate developers.
name: Sneaky Yak Studio

description: MFF Labs is a next-generation game studio dedicated to building fast, fun and globally accessible mobile games. Our approach blends technical excellence, real-time multiplayer expertise and a strong focus on player engagement. We design experiences that are both competitive and entertaining, powered by modern technologies and a community-first mindset.
name: MFF LABS

description: Studio Hybrid is a solo developer studio by a man named Jack Breen. He’s a pixel artist, programmer, musician, story teller, and overall, a game designer. When he’s not making games, he’s using his experiences and knowledge to lift up others through his YouTube channel, Hybrid Plays. If you've ever had the urge to watch someone break dishes with a bat while wearing a banana costume and explaining the core mechanics of game design, Jack’s your guy.
name: Studio Hybrid

description: Independent programmer
name: ScottyAnimation

description: Picrose is a one-man operation by Colin Rosen. It started as a way to do freelance work part-time, but as time went on and circumstances changed we started making our own games.
name: Colin Rosen

description:
Formed as Hu-ERA Limited Company from ex members of Hudson (Japan) and ERA International Limited Company (Taiwan).

Re-formed in 1994 as "Warp Power" in Hong Kong.
name: Warp Power Interactive Entertainment Ltd.

description: Blindspot Games is a brand-new independent studio whose objective is to create high-quality games with a small team in which every member has a direct impact on the quality of their projects. Based in Montreal and founded by industry veterans, their 15 people team has extensive experience with tactical and multiplayer games and share one core-value: it’s possible to make good games in a 4-day work-week crunch-free environment. Blindspot Games likes to share their dev journey with their community. Whether you’re an aspiring developer or a fan of tactical games, you can have a chat with the dev team on their Discord server.
name: Blindspot Games

description:
Lucid Labs was established in 2015 and quickly made a name for itself with a reputation for quality and creativity, thanks to its award-winning lineup of imaginative games available on platforms like Apple Arcade, VR, PC, and consoles. As a proud participant in the Google Games Accelerator, the studio focuses on creating engaging casual games that feature lighthearted storytelling.

Fueled by a passion for crafting surreal yet intuitive experiences, we've accomplished milestones that once felt like distant dreams. Our journey includes a live showcase at the WWDC 2019 Keynote and being featured as a launch title on Apple Arcade. With 'Possessions' on Apple Arcade, we won our first 'Game of the Year' award, earning multiple nominations and coverage in international media.

Having garnered over twenty 'Game of the Year' awards along with numerous accolades, Lucid Labs takes pride in its dedicated team, which is committed to pushing the envelope in the gaming industry and highlighting Indian talent on the global stage.
name: Lucid Labs

description: Indie and fan game developers
name: Syntax Partnership

description: FODSOFT is a studio founded by Néo Foderé de Frutos in Arenys de Munt, Barcelona, Spain, in February 2025. It is primarily focused on software development, although it also publishes video games developed by NSTUDIOS GAMES on digital platforms.
name: FODSOFT

description: Graile Games is a group of game developers, Timon, Alex, Dwight & Emile. Graile Games are additionally the publishers of the 2013 top-down roguelike videogame; & university project "Abyssus".
name: Graile Games

description: "Gunfire Games is an independent game developer based in Austin, Texas. With core team members including the remnant of Vigil games, best known for creating and shipping the DARKSIDERS franchise, and the developers behind Chronos, the Oculus Rift Adventure RPG. We started the studio because we love what we do: Crafting worlds; building games; it’s our DNA."
name: Gunfire Games
